description: Manufacturer and developer of laser systems and electro-optical components for research and industry applications. The company offers industrial beam-steered laser marking systems, and mechanical marking and engraving systems used for coding, marking, and engraving various materials. The company also provides laser micro-machining systems for cutting, drilling, ablating, and other micro machining applications; custom micro-machining systems; and sealed CO2 lasers. It also manufactures galvanometer-based optical scanners, solid-state lasers and ultrafast lasers. The company produces custom precision optical components, such as flying height test disks and a range of thin film coatings.
